findings.title: Plaintext token in config
findings.detail: A long-lived credential is stored unencrypted in the config. Mitigated by 0600 perms + loopback gateway, but a SecretRef/keychain-backed value is stronger.

fix.title: Rotate / vault the token
fix.risk: Anyone who can read the config file can read this credential verbatim.
fix.command: openclaw gateway auth rotate   # regenerate + rewrite; then confirm services reconnect

domains.name: Access & Config Safety
domains.math: 100 − 15 (AirPlay Receiver listening on all interfaces) − 5 (Consumer LAN listeners (expected)) = 80

findings.title: AirPlay Receiver listening on all interfaces
findings.detail: ControlCenter (AirPlay Receiver) is bound to *:7000, *:5000 — a network-exposed media receiver and a known LAN attack surface.

fix.title: Turn off AirPlay Receiver (if unused)
fix.command: # System Settings → General → AirDrop & Handoff → AirPlay Receiver → Off (no safe headless toggle)

findings.title: Consumer LAN listeners (expected)
findings.detail: Standard Apple/consumer services listening on the LAN: rapportd *:55693, Spotify *:55695, Spotify *:57621. Expected on a personal Mac; no action needed.

findings.title: Unrotated error log
findings.detail: gateway.err.log is 233 MB with no rotation — disk pressure and slow forensics.

fix.title: Archive & rotate the error log
fix.risk: Unbounded log growth; slower incident review.
